project.name: Remote Falcon Platform
project.description: Aggregator for Maven modules in the Remote Falcon monorepo. Run `mvn install` from this directory to build libs/schema first, then the Maven services in dependency order. Gradle services (viewer, plugins-api, account-archive, mongo-backup) live under apps/ but are not part of this reactor — they consume libs/schema via mavenLocal after a fresh `mvn install`.
